name: BotForge
tagline: Automate conversations without automating your budget away
metaDescription: BotForge replaces ManyChat with a visual chatbot builder inside AppBuster. Build flows, capture leads, and automate support — saving $1,188/year.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🤖</text></svg>

features.title: Visual Flow Builder
features.desc: Design conversation flows with a drag-and-drop canvas. Branch on user responses, set conditions, and create complex multi-step dialogues without writing any code.

features.title: Multi-Platform Deploy
features.desc: Deploy bots to your website, Facebook Messenger, Instagram DMs, and SMS from a single flow. Manage all conversations in one unified inbox.

features.title: Smart Triggers
features.desc: Launch bot conversations based on page visits, time on site, exit intent, or custom events. Target the right visitor at the right moment to maximize engagement.

features.title: Lead Qualification
features.desc: Ask qualifying questions and score leads in real time during the conversation. Route hot prospects to your sales team and nurture the rest automatically.

features.title: Workflow Automation
features.desc: Trigger actions beyond chat — create CRM records, send emails, update spreadsheets, or call webhooks when specific conversation milestones are reached.

features.title: Conversation Analytics
features.desc: Track completion rates, drop-off points, and response patterns across all your bot flows. Identify where users get stuck and optimize for better outcomes.
